subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from this Prisoner unto him who hath believed in God and desireth to turn toward the sanctuary of His good-pleasure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من هذا المسجون الی الذی آمن بالله و اراد ان یتوجه الی شطر رضائه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
